title: Close CI-RED-003 saw batch complexity tail
intent: Repair the stale complexity baseline line keys for saw_lab/batch_router.py and extract the RMOS mirror path into tested helper functions so debt-gates can evaluate the current SAW batch surface instead of the stale CI-RED-003 tail.

diff_articulation.what_changed: batch_router.py now delegates the SAW batch RMOS mirror path to batch_router_helpers.py. complexity_baseline.json receives line-number-only repairs for the two still-accepted batch_router findings, without accepting new complexity debt. test_batch_toolpaths_rmos_mirror_unit.py characterizes the happy path plus missing-artifact and fallback-context behavior. SPRINTS.md records the CI-RED-003 current verdict.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The complexity gate narrowed from the stale 113-violation ledger to a current SAW batch tail: two stale line-key entries and the mirror helper exceeding the complexity threshold. The helper extraction preserves the route behavior while moving the high-complexity mirror chain out of the router function, and the baseline edit only re-anchors existing accepted findings to their current lines.

commands_run: Complexity gate witness from PR #144: batch_router complexity tail cleared; remaining debt-gates red is the separate plural file-size baseline handled by PR #145
Characterization test covers create_batch_toolpaths RMOS mirror chain and generated artifact lineage
Additional edge witnesses cover missing decision 404, missing plan/spec 404, and session/batch/tool fallback context
CBSP21 manifest now declares all changed files in the PR scope

files.intent: Record the current CI-RED-003 verdict and remove stale 113-violation framing
Repair stale line keys for existing accepted batch_router complexity findings without changing accepted complexity values
Delegate RMOS mirror work to helper module so router complexity falls under the gate threshold
Host the extracted SAW batch RMOS mirror helper chain
Characterize RMOS mirror behavior across happy path, missing-artifact errors, and fallback context
Declare CI-RED-003 patch scope for CBSP21 review
